title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on AGI economics. Topics include optimal taxation and wealth redistribution, capital share growth, inequality trajectories, integration of humans into a machine-driven economy, and strategies for developing countries.
